description_long: This sculpture depicts a reclining human figure, likely female, lying on her side atop a textured base that resembles a bed or natural surface. The figure is rendered in a classical style, with smooth, flowing contours and detailed anatomical features. The head is gently resting on one arm, while the other arm is draped along the body, and one leg is bent at the knee. The base is rectangular and appears to be carved with additional relief details, possibly representing drapery or waves. The material is a pale, stone-like substance, giving the sculpture a timeless and serene appearance. The overall impression is one of tranquility and repose, with careful attention to the naturalistic pose and surface texture.
description: A classical-style reclining human figure sculpted in pale stone, lying on a textured rectangular base. The figure exudes tranquility and detailed realism.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reclining figure's face, bent knee, and the detailed surface of the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the figure's body and the gentle curve of the pose.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the figure and the rounded contours of the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the figure's profile and the extended leg along the base.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
